results.title: Carmelo Hayes Reacts To Baron Corbin’s WWE Return
results.description: Before Baron Corbin made his shocking return to WWE, Carmelo Hayes had actually encouraged it. Now, he’s wishing he hadn’t. For weeks, speculation surrounded Corbin’s future after reports suggested he would leave MLW — where he held the MLW World Tag Team Championships alongside Donovan Dijak — and make his way back to WWE following [...]

results.title: Ex-Nogizaka46 idol turned pro mahjong player reveals Vietnam photo book, laments failed championship wish
results.description: The August release features shots taken in coastal city of Da Nang and the historic town of Hoi An The post Ex-Nogizaka46 idol turned pro mahjong player reveals Vietnam photo book, laments failed championship wish appeared first on TokyoReporter .
